summary: Completed testing of 8 fixes in iteration 24. All issues verified and working. Fixed 1 bug: Missing AlertCircle import in AdminLicensesPage.jsx causing Reset Balance dialog to fail.

issues: Page title 'Trade Monitor' slightly cut off at top on mobile viewport - minor

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 issues tested and verified working: 1) Licensee simulation dialog finds existing licensees (Test Registration User, New Extended User, Test Extended User, etc.), 2) Deposit/Withdrawal menu NOT visible for non-licensees (master admin), 3) Trade Monitor timer has truncate class for overflow prevention - displays correctly on mobile, 4) Reset Balance button and dialog working in Active Licenses tab (fixed missing AlertCircle import), 5) Platform settings (platform_name, tagline, hide_emergent_badge) persist after refresh, 6) Login page shows platform name and tagline from settings, 7) Members page shows correct account_value from license.current_amount for licensees, 8) Demo simulation shows $5,000.00 in Profit Tracker.

features_tested.licensee_simulation_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with Demo Mode and specific licensee options (Test Registration User, New Extended User, Test Extended User, Unknown User)
features_tested.menu_filtering_for_licensees: PASS - Deposit/Withdrawal menu NOT visible for non-licensee (master admin)
features_tested.trade_monitor_timer_overflow: PASS - Time text has truncate class, displays correctly on mobile (18:05:18)
features_tested.reset_starting_amount: PASS - Reset Balance button and dialog working in Active Licenses tab
features_tested.platform_settings_persistence: PASS - Platform name and tagline persist after refresh
features_tested.login_page_logo: PASS - Login page shows platform name (CrossCurrent) and tagline (Finance Center) from settings
features_tested.licensee_account_value_sync: PASS - Members page shows correct account_value from license.current_amount
features_tested.demo_simulation_values: PASS - Demo simulation shows $5,000.00 in Profit Tracker

missing_alertcircle_import.issue: AlertCircle icon used but not imported, causing Reset Balance dialog to fail with runtime error
